sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20122" key="blhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλητ-έον</orth>, <sense id="n20122.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must throw</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Marc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
